name: claude-plugin
description: Directory of Claude Code extensions including development tools, productivity plugins, and MCP integrations

plugins.name: claude-signal-alert
plugins.description: Sound notifications for Claude Code events. Plays sounds when Claude needs input or completes tasks.

plugins.name: local-plan-viewer
plugins.description: Automatically archives session plans with manual command override for on-demand archiving

plugins.name: bash-execution-info
plugins.description: Automatically logs all bash command executions with outputs
